articles.title: NASA officials sidestepped questions on Artemis II risks—there’s a reason why - Ars Technica

articles.author: Sean O'Kane
articles.title: Travis Kalanick launches a new company called Atoms focused on robotics - TechCrunch
articles.description: Kalanick's existing ghost kitchen company CloudKitchens will be rolled into Atoms, which also wants to get into mining and transport.
articles.content:
Uber founder Travis Kalanick has a new company called Atoms focused on robotics that, according to its website, will operate in the food, mining, and transportation industries.
